normalization.notes: Store modern Armenian text in NFC and preserve source casing and punctuation. Do not fold the ew ligature or the ու digraph during learner-visible display.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Armenian letters, uppercase/lowercase pairs, the ու digraph, the և ligature, punctuation marks, and high-frequency aspirated consonants
segmentation.notes: Modern Armenian uses whitespace word boundaries. The course should teach case pairs and selected multi-code-point units without treating every rendered letter sequence as a Unicode grapheme cluster.
